paragraphs.source: From small mobile CPUs to large AI accelerators, ISSCC featured first-time architectural breakdowns from MediaTek, Intel, AMD, Rebellions, and Microsoft. Many even included die shots.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: From small mobile CPUs to large AI accelerators, ISSCC featured first-time architectural breakdowns from MediaTek, Intel, AMD, Rebellions, and Microsoft. Many even included die shots.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: From small mobile CPUs to large AI accelerators, ISSCC featured first-time architectural breakdowns from MediaTek, Intel, AMD, Rebellions, and Microsoft. Many even included die shots.

pro.text: 从移动端的小型CPU（中央处理器）到大型AI（人工智能）加速器，本届ISSCC（国际固态电路会议）首次披露了来自联发科（MediaTek）、英特尔（Intel）、AMD、Rebellions和微软（Microsoft）的多款产品的架构细节。其中许多甚至提供了芯片裸片（die）照片。

issues.description: “芯片裸片（die）照片”的表述略显冗余，可更简洁。
